title: nephrodium longissimum
intro: Nephrodium longissimum, also known as the Long Fern or Ostrich Fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium longissimum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including dried leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
